'''''Nebula Chaser''''' was a modified thousand-meter long [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Pollux]], customized with [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc.]] sublight drives. It had a hammerhead-shaped front.

It was carrying ten thousand refugees from [[Talfaglio]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], and the two [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Alema Rar]] and her sister [[Numa Rar]] sneaked aboard to flee the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] following the catastrophe on [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]. However, the ''[[Gift of Anguish]]'' intercepted the vessel, releasing a [[voxyn]] onto the ''Nebula Chaser'', where it found the two Jedi and spat acid onto Numa's face, killing her soon after. The incident was one of the very first encounters with a voxyn.

The crew was killed for lying to the invaders, and the ship was subsequently used in an attempt to bargain with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] over information on the location of [[Eclipse Station]]. On her refusal, the ''Nebula Chaser'' was destroyed along with thousands of refugees.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
